name: Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and shortening with a hand mixer until creamy.
2. Beat in sugar with an electric mixer until creamy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Mix dry ingredients (flour, cocoa, salt, baking powder) together.
5. Alternately add milk to the dry mixture, beginning and ending with flour; mix until just combined.
6. Stir in vanilla.
7. Prepare a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 25 minutes to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Let cool completely.
10. For icing: Sift together powdered sugar and cocoa. Beat butter until creamy.
11. Add some of the sugar-cocoa mixture to the butter, beating on low speed.
12. Stir in hot milk and the remaining sugar mixture; beat well.
13. Add vanilla and beat again.
14. Spread icing over the cooled cake.
Note: Do not rush the cooling process for best results.
